stemHtml: Whilst passing FL260 during the descent, ATC clears the aircraft to descend to 2000 ft. The altimeter setting shall...

options.a: Change to local QNH when passing the transition level.
options.b: Change to local QNH when passing the transition altitude.
options.c: Remain on QNH until passing the transition level.
options.d: Be set to QNH immediately, as long as the aircraft Is under ATC control.
